BRiST♥ 2.0
Bridge without the tricky bits
A partnership trick-taking card game for four players
Choose your seat
North–South and East–West are partners.
The declarer controls the dummy hand.
South is the first dealer and scorer. Dealer rotates clockwise each hand. Red and blue decks alternate automatically.
Choose 3 from the kitty
Tap the top card to take it, or skip. You must take the last cards you need.

Kitty — 12 remaining

Your hand
BRiST contract and scoring card
Tap a contract below. Declarer scores only when the contract is made. Defenders always score one point per trick and receive a 10-point bonus when the contract is defeated.
